legal_description.value: Lot 44, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to the plat of record in the office of the County Recorder of Maricopa County, Arizona, recorded in Book 554 of Maps, Page 19

affiant_name.value: CHEN ROBERT K (surviving joint tenant, spouse of decedent)

death_certificate_reference.value: State of Arizona Certificate of Death (attached as Exhibit A); AZ File No. 2023-XXXXXXX

source_note.value: Demo-only synthesized Affidavit of Death of Joint Tenant for Chen family parcel 999-01-362. In Arizona, community-property-with-right-of-survivorship title (as established in 20080200001) passes to the surviving spouse by operation of law on death; the affidavit simply cures the record and is recorded with an attached death certificate. No probate required for this first death. Not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only affidavit of death of joint tenant for Chen family parcel 999-01-362; not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
